[TIP] Common fixes:
  1. XML well-formedness: write typography as raw Unicode (—, ©, →, NBSP); escape XML reserved chars as & < > " ' — never use HTML named entities like   — ©
  2. viewBox issues: root viewBox is the canvas authority (see references/canvas-formats.md)
  3. foreignObject: Use <text> + <tspan> for manual line breaks
  4. Font issues: use PPT-safe exported typefaces (e.g. Microsoft YaHei / Arial / Consolas)
